description: An inbound international shipment has been selected for a random physical inspection by customs.

nodes.task_description: Receive a notification from the customs broker about the inspection.

expected_outcome.value: Agent is alerted to the inspection.

nodes.task_description: Coordinate with the carrier and the customs officials to arrange the inspection.
Monitor the status of the inspection.

expected_outcome.value: Agent waits for the inspection to be completed.

nodes.task_description: Once the shipment is released, update the ETA and notify relevant internal teams.

expected_outcome.value: The shipment is released, and the agent updates the system and notifies stakeholders of the new delivery date.
